repos.name: proxy-checker
repos.description: Proxy Checker 是一个自托管优先的免费代理检测、筛选、仓库维护工具。你可以把它理解成一个给代理池做体检的小面板：拉取持续更新的公共代理源，批量检测 HTTP、HTTPS、SOCKS4、SOCKS5、SOCKS5H，把真正有用的代理放进“我的仓库”，再生成稳定的 TXT / JSON 链接给脚本、服务或其他工具直接拉取。  如果你经常折腾代理、跑号服务器、API 连通性。
repos.description_zh: Proxy Buttons是一个自托管优先的免费代理检测、选择、库维护工具。你可以把它理解成一个给代理池做体检的小面板：拉获取持续更新的公共代理源，批发检测 HTTP，HTTPS，SOCKS4，SOCKS5，SOCKS5H，真正使用的代理释放进入“我的库”，再生成稳定的XT/ JSON 链接到本、服务或其他工具直接获取。  如果你经常折扣代理，号码服务器，API 连通性。

repos.description_zh: 开源基于Ghostty的macOS终端，具有垂直选项卡和人工智能编码代理通知。专为多任务处理、组织和可编程性而构建。

repos.name: obsidian-second-brain
repos.description: Cross-CLI skill for Obsidian. Turns your vault into a living AI-first second brain across Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode. 32 commands, vault-first research, scheduled agents, write-time AI-first validator.
repos.description_zh: Obsidian的跨CLI技能。将您的金库变成一个活生生的人工智能第一第二大脑，跨越Claude Code、Codex CLI、Gemini CLI和OpenCode。32个命令、保险库优先研究、预定代理、写时AI优先验证器。

repos.name: learn-claude-code-rs
repos.description: Build an AI agent harness in Rust, from a minimal loop to tools, subagents, memory, teams, worktrees,   MCP, and typed tool routing.
repos.description_zh: 在Rust中构建人工智能代理工具，从最小循环到工具、子代理、内存、团队、工作树，   MCB，并输入工具布线。

repos.name: opensquilla
repos.description: OpenSquilla — Token-Efficient AI Agent with same budget, higher intelligence density
repos.description_zh: OpenSquilla -代币高效人工智能代理，预算相同，情报密度更高

repos.name: trainingpeaks-mcp
repos.description: TrainingPeaks MCP server for Claude Desktop, Code and Cowork. No API approval needed - works with any account. Query workouts, CTL/ATL/TSB fitness data, power PRs via natural language.
repos.description_zh: 为Claude桌面、Code和Cowork训练Peaks的LCP服务器。无需API批准-适用于任何帐户。通过自然语言查询锻炼、CTS/ATL/TSB健身数据、为PR供电。

repos.name: xero-command-line
repos.description: A command-line interface tool for the Xero API
repos.description_zh: Xero API的命令行界面工具

repos.name: agent-skills
repos.description: A collection of Agent skills and Claude Code plugins for HashiCorp products.
repos.description_zh: HashiCorp产品的代理技能和Claude Code插件集。

repos.name: DocuBrowser
repos.description: This does for Documents what repo-browser does for repos. A local AI powered Document search engine
repos.description_zh: 这对文档的作用就像repo-browser对repo的作用一样。本地人工智能支持的文档搜索引擎

repos.name: tapestry
repos.description: Project Tapestry aims to give every nation and participant frontier AI they can call their own — uniting a global consortium to train a shared frontier model from which partners build and own sovereign models aligned to their national, socio-cultural, and industrial needs.
repos.description_zh: Project Tapestry旨在为每个国家和参与者提供他们可以称之为自己的前沿人工智能-联合一个全球联盟来训练共享前沿模型，合作伙伴从中构建和拥有符合其国家、社会文化和工业需求的主权模型。

repos.name: Meccha-Chameleon-MecchaVoid
repos.description: MECCHA CHAMELEON ESP · Aimbot · Fly Hack · Teleport · God Mode · Infinite Paint
repos.description_zh: Mechcha CHAMLEON ESG· Aimbot · Fly Hack ·传送·上帝模式·无限彩绘

repos.name: Claude-BugHunter
repos.description: A Claude Code skill bundle for bug hunting and external red-team work — 71 skills, 15 slash commands, 681 disclosed-report patterns curated across 24 core vulnerability classes, plus enterprise identity + infrastructure attack matrices.
repos.description_zh: Claude Code技能包，用于漏洞查找和外部红团队工作- 71种技能、15个斜线命令、跨24个核心漏洞类精心策划的681种预定报告模式，以及企业身份+基础设施攻击矩阵。

repos.name: hunk
repos.description: Review-first terminal diff viewer for agentic coders
repos.description_zh: 审查-第一终端差异查看器代理编码器

repos.name: WeKnora
repos.description: Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.
repos.description_zh: 开源LLM知识平台：将原始文档转化为可查询的RAG、自主推理代理和自我维护的维基。

repos.name: tomari-guruguru
repos.description: 25方向のマウス追従と口パクに対応したトマリ用ブラウザアバター
repos.description_zh: 25方向のマウス追従と口パクに対応したトマリ用ブラウザアバター

repos.name: cve-lite-cli
repos.description: Fast, developer-friendly JS/TS dependency vulnerability scanner with local lockfile scanning, OSV matching, direct vs transitive visibility, --fix, JSON output, and practical remediation guidance.
repos.description_zh: 快速、开发人员友好的JS/TS依赖漏洞扫描器，具有本地锁文件扫描、OSV匹配、直接与传递可见性、--修复、杨森输出和实用的补救指导。

repos.name: OpenMontage
repos.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
repos.description_zh: 世界上第一个开源、代理视频制作系统。12条管道、52种工具、500+名代理技能。将您的人工智能编码助理变成完整的视频制作工作室。

repos.name: Cli-Proxy-API-Management-Center
repos.description: This is a WebUI interface based on CLI-Proxy-API, designed to simplify configuration modifications and runtime status monitoring.
repos.description_zh: 这是一个基于CLI-Proxy-API的WebUI界面，旨在简化配置修改和运行时状态监控。

repos.name: app-store-preflight-skills
repos.description: AI agent skill to scan iOS/macOS projects for App Store rejection patterns before submission
repos.description_zh: AI代理技能在提交之前扫描iOS/macOS项目以了解App Store拒绝模式

repos.name: spec_driven_develop
repos.description: Spec-driven development workflow for AI coding agents: architecture-first planning, task decomposition, GitHub Issue/PR tracking, Deep Discuss, and adaptive control for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and other Markdown-capable agents.
repos.description_zh: 人工智能编码代理的规范驱动开发工作流程：架构优先规划、任务分解、GitHub Issue/PR跟踪、Deep Discuss以及Claude Code、Codex、Cursor和其他具有Markdown功能的代理的自适应控制。

repos.name: Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
repos.description: 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0
repos.description_zh: 754种人工智能代理的结构化网络安全技能·映射到5个框架：MITRE ATA & CK、NIH CSF 2.0、MITRE ATLAS、D3 FEND & NUM AI RMF ·agentskills.io标准·与Claude Code、GitHub Copilot、Codex CLI、Cursor、Gemini CLI & 20+平台· 26个安全域· Apache 2.0
